calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Relaxx Investments, Inc., Hod Rubenstein or Eric A. Rubenstein.
Defaults were entered against defendants on January 29, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 29, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 10, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Relaxx Investments, Inc., Hod Rubenstein and Eric A. Rubenstein as follows:

Damages/Principal - $37,470.70.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,575.72.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $419.08, for a total judgment in the amount of $42,965.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2009 Off Calendar
